title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what motivates people to learn new languages and what benefits multilingualism brings.

images.label: A
images.description: A student sitting at a desk surrounded by language textbooks, vocabulary flashcards and a notebook full of handwritten grammar notes

images.label: B
images.description: A traveller navigating a busy market in Morocco, attempting to communicate in Arabic with a stall holder, both gesturing and laughing

followUp.question: What do you think is the most effective way to learn a new language, and why?

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what the advantages and challenges of bilingual education might be for students and their families.

images.label: D
images.description: A primary school teacher conducting a science lesson entirely in a second language, using visual aids to help young students understand

images.label: E
images.description: Children in a bilingual school playground switching effortlessly between two languages as they play, a teacher observing with a smile

followUp.question: Do you think all children should be educated in more than one language from an early age? What are the arguments for and against?
